name: GeoCities USA
description: The original wild west of personal web publishing — millions of pages, each a unique artifact of whoever built them and whenever they built them.
content_note: Personal homepages, fan sites, hobbyist pages, and early web experiments.

name: Angelfire
description: GeoCities' scrappier rival — where the backgrounds were more chaotic, the MIDI music louder, and the under-construction GIFs more animated.
content_note: Fan fiction, personal journals, early web art, and hobbyist communities.

name: Tripod
description: The third pillar of early free web hosting — where college students built their first websites and bands posted their first MP3s.
content_note: Student pages, band sites, early blogs, and community forums.
